experiences.title: Self-Directed Cybersecurity Student & Homelab Builder
experiences.description: Actively building hands-on experience through homelab projects while studying for CompTIA Security+ and transitioning into cybersecurity.
bullets: Designed and implemented a segmented Zero Trust network using OPNsense, UniFi, VLANs, and Cloudflare Tunnel
Deployed and hardened a Proxmox homelab with Docker containers, Nginx reverse proxy, Fail2Ban, and WireGuard VPN
Focused on infrastructure hardening, network segmentation, and practical security implementations

experiences.title: Agency Owner / Agent
experiences.description: Built the agency from scratch & managed full business operations and regulatory compliance for 150+ client portfolios annually. Acquired Jan '25.
bullets: Managed full business operations including compliance, budgeting, and risk assessment
Maintained 100% regulatory compliance through audits, policy reviews, and documentation
Hired, trained, and mentored junior staff for sales & support
Handled all field underwriting for entire sales team
